title: FE-06 LLM Integration - Boundary/Negative Scenario Suggestion via n8n Webhook
description: Chi tiet toan bo LLM integration pipeline cho FE-06: n8n webhook communication, Observation-Confirmation prompt pattern, caching strategy, audit trail, va error handling.

testSuiteId.description: ID cua test suite dang generate.

testSuiteName.description: Ten test suite de LLM reference.

globalBusinessRules.description: Business rules toan cuc tu TestSuite.GlobalBusinessRules. LLM dung de hieu domain context.

endpoints.description: Danh sach endpoints can goi y boundary/negative scenarios.

httpMethod.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, HEAD, OPTIONS).

orderIndex.description: Thu tu endpoint trong approved order.

businessContext.description: Business context rieng cho endpoint nay tu TestSuite.EndpointBusinessContexts[endpointId].

parameterSchemaPayloads.description: Raw JSON schemas cua request parameters/body.

responseSchemaPayloads.description: Raw JSON schemas cua response body.

parameterDetails.description: Parameter details (Name, Location, DataType, Format, IsRequired, DefaultValue).

scenarios.description: Danh sach scenarios LLM goi y.

model.description: LLM model da dung (vd: gpt-4-turbo, claude-3-opus, gemini-pro).

tokensUsed.description: Tong so tokens da tieu thu.

endpointId.description: Endpoint ma scenario nay thuoc ve.

scenarioName.description: Ten scenario (human-readable). VD: 'Create user with duplicate email'.

description.description: Mo ta chi tiet ve scenario.

request.description: Reuse N8nTestCaseRequest model tu happy-path. Gom: HttpMethod, Url, Body, PathParams, QueryParams, Headers.

expectation.description: Reuse N8nTestCaseExpectation model tu happy-path. Gom: ExpectedStatus[], BodyContains[], etc.

variables.description: Variables de tham chieu giua cac test cases.

observationConfirmationPromptPattern.description: Pattern tu academic papers (COmbine/RBCTest). Chia LLM call thanh 2 buoc: Observation (quan sat endpoint) va Confirmation (xac nhan scenarios). Giup LLM tap trung va giam hallucination.

fields.systemPrompt: System instruction cho LLM role va format

observationConfirmationPromptPattern.promptIndexMapping: prompt[i] maps to orderedEndpoints[i]. Neu i >= prompts.Count thi promptPayload = null.

cachingStrategy.description: Cache LLM suggestions per-endpoint de giam chi phi va tang toc do khi regenerate. All-or-nothing cache: chi tra cache khi ALL endpoints co cache hit.

algorithm: 3. Take first 16 hex characters (8 bytes) as cache key.
cacheKeyGeneration.determinism: Cung input (suiteId + specId + sorted endpointIds) -> cung cache key.

logic: - If cached.HasCache == false -> return null immediately (cache miss).
- If cached.HasCache == true -> deserialize JSON to List<LlmSuggestedScenario>.
2. If ALL endpoints have cache hit -> assemble allCachedScenarios and return LlmScenarioSuggestionResult { Scenarios, FromCache=true }.
3. If ANY endpoint has cache miss -> return null (treat as full cache miss, call LLM for fresh results).
cacheLookup.errorHandling: JsonException during cache deserialization -> log warning, return null (treat as cache miss).
cacheLookup.strategy: All-or-nothing: partial cache hits are NOT used. This simplifies logic va dam bao consistency.

logic: - Get scenarios for this endpoint (or empty list if none).
cacheSave.errorHandling: Catch Exception -> log warning, do not throw. Cache save failure does not affect main flow.
cacheSave.note: Cache luu per-endpoint (khong luu gom). Khi 1 endpoint bi invalidate thi chi endpoint do bi miss.

suggestionTypeConstant.name: SuggestionTypeBoundaryNegative
suggestionTypeConstant.mappedTo: LlmSuggestionCache.SuggestionType enum: BoundaryCase=0, NegativeCase=1, HappyPath=2, SecurityCase=3
suggestionTypeConstant.note: Dung value 1 (NegativeCase) cho ca boundary va negative combined scenarios.

cacheInvalidation.automatic: ExpiresAt column tren LlmSuggestionCache. Entries cu tu dong het han sau 24h.
cacheInvalidation.manual: Hien tai khong co API de manual invalidate cache. Regenerate voi IncludeLlmSuggestions=true se dung cached results neu con han.
cacheInvalidation.forceRefresh: Chua implemented. Neu can force refresh LLM suggestions, phai doi cache het han hoac manual xoa record trong DB.

auditTrail.description: Log moi LLM interaction vao LlmInteraction entity qua ILlmAssistantGatewayService.SaveInteractionAsync.

fields.inputContext: string — serialized N8nBoundaryNegativePayload (full request sent to n8n)
fields.llmResponse: string — serialized N8nBoundaryNegativeResponse (full response from n8n)
fields.latencyMs: int — elapsed milliseconds for n8n call (measured by Stopwatch)

callingPattern.timing: Sau khi n8n call hoan tat, TRUOC khi parse response.
callingPattern.errorHandling: Wrap trong try-catch. Catch Exception -> log warning ('Failed to save LLM interaction for audit'), do NOT throw. Main flow continues normally.

logic: 1. If response == null OR response.Scenarios == null OR empty -> return empty list.

testCaseBuilding.description: Tao TestCase entity tu LlmSuggestedScenario. Reuse ITestCaseRequestBuilder va ITestCaseExpectationBuilder tu FE-05B.

steps.input: N8nTestCaseRequest { HttpMethod=orderItem.HttpMethod, Url=orderItem.Path, Body=scenario.SuggestedBody, PathParams, QueryParams, Headers }
steps.note: Reuse cung builder voi FE-05B happy-path. Builder xu ly null fields va fallback.
Reuse cung builder voi FE-05B happy-path.

crossModuleCommunication.description: FE-06 LLM pipeline giao tiep voi LlmAssistant module qua contract interface. Khong truy cap truc tiep entity/repository.

methods.name: SaveInteractionAsync
methods.description: Luu 1 LlmInteraction record cho audit trail.

methods.name: GetCachedSuggestionsAsync
methods.signature: Task<CachedSuggestionsDto> GetCachedSuggestionsAsync(Guid endpointId, int suggestionType, string cacheKey, CancellationToken ct)
methods.description: Check cache cho 1 endpoint. Tra HasCache=true neu co record chua het han.

methods.name: CacheSuggestionsAsync
methods.signature: Task CacheSuggestionsAsync(Guid endpointId, int suggestionType, string cacheKey, string suggestionsJson, TimeSpan ttl, CancellationToken ct)
methods.description: Luu hoac update cache cho 1 endpoint. Set ExpiresAt = now + ttl.

crossModuleCommunication.principle: TestGeneration module chi biet interface ILlmAssistantGatewayService. Khong import LlmAssistant namespace truc tiep. DI container resolve implementation.

gracefulDegradation.principle: LLM-related failures KHONG duoc lam fail main generation flow. Audit va cache la best-effort.

scenarios.handling: Catch Exception, log warning, continue. Test cases van duoc tao va persist.
scenarios.code: try { await SaveInteractionAsync(...); } catch (Exception ex) { _logger.LogWarning(ex, 'Failed to save LLM interaction...'); }

scenarios.handling: Catch Exception, log warning, continue. Lan sau se goi LLM lai (vi khong co cache).
scenarios.code: try { await CacheResultsAsync(...); } catch (Exception ex) { _logger.LogWarning(ex, 'Failed to cache LLM suggestions...'); }

scenarios.handling: Catch JsonException, log warning, return null (treat as cache miss). Goi LLM fresh.
scenarios.code: catch (JsonException ex) { _logger.LogWarning(ex, 'Failed to deserialize cached suggestions...'); return null; }

criticalFailures.description: Cac failure NAM TRONG main flow se throw exception va tra HTTP error cho client.

scenarios.handling: Exception propagate len CommandHandler -> GlobalExceptionHandler -> HTTP 500.
scenarios.note: n8n call failure la critical vi khong co fallback. Khong co retry built-in hien tai.

scenarios.failure: n8n response parse fails (invalid JSON, unexpected structure)
scenarios.handling: Null/empty scenarios list returned. TotalGenerated co the = 0 neu chi dung LLM pipeline.
scenarios.note: ParseScenarios handle null response gracefully — return empty list.

n8nCallLatency.typical: 2000-10000ms (depends on LLM model, endpoint count, prompt complexity)
n8nCallLatency.measurement: Stopwatch in LlmScenarioSuggester, logged as LatencyMs

cacheHitBenefit.description: Cache hit skip toan bo: prompt building, n8n call, response parsing. Chi can deserialize cached JSON.

memoryConsideration.payloadSerialization: Full payload va response duoc serialize cho audit log. Co the lon (100KB+) voi nhieu endpoints.
memoryConsideration.suggestion: Monitor LlmInteraction table size. Consider archival strategy for old records.

usage: Serialize payload/response cho audit log (InputContext, LlmResponse)
